overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a lush bioluminescent cave system with waterfalls and a large mechanical creature. The character walks through shallow water, climbs rocky cliffs, and traverses toward an open lagoon illuminated by moonlight.

events.description: large mechanical creature activates with glowing blue lights

agents.ego_description: walking past the dormant mechanical creature, observing it as blue lights activate

entered.detail: large white and black armored mechanical beast partially submerged in water
moss-covered rock face with cascading water
green mossy ground with shallow water pools

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a mossy cavern entrance past a massive dormant mechanical creature. As the character passes, the machine's blue lights activate, illuminating the teal-tinted rocky surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water path leading to twin waterfalls

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow turquoise water toward the cascading waterfalls

entered.detail: two parallel waterfalls cascading down rock face with teal bioluminescent lighting
clear shallow water with visible rocky bottom

segments.scene_description: Leaving the mechanical wreckage behind, the character wades through a shallow lagoon toward twin waterfalls. The enclosed canyon walls create an intimate, water-filled passage with diffused teal lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical rock face with waterfall and climbing path

events.description: character transitions from walking to climbing up the rock face

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky cliff face near the waterfall, pulling up onto ledges

entered.detail: vertical rock wall with handholds and patches of moss
rocky outcrop above the main waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending the cliff face beside the waterfall, transitioning from horizontal movement to vertical climbing. The camera tilts upward to follow the ascent along the mossy rock wall toward the upper ledge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open moonlit lagoon with distant ruins

events.description: scene opens up to reveal large moon and night sky, lighting shifts to silvery moonlight

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water toward the moonlit horizon, surveying the open lagoon

entered.detail: large bright full moon illuminating the scene from above
silhouetted ancient structures on the horizon
shimmering silver light path across the water surface

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed cliff area, the scene opens into a vast moonlit lagoon. The bright moon dominates the night sky, casting a silver reflection across the water as the character walks toward the distant silhouetted ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a bioluminescent cavern into a vast, moonlit open-air lagoon. It begins as the character walks through a mossy entrance past a massive dormant mechanical creature, which suddenly activates with blue lights that illuminate the teal-tinted rocky surroundings. As the character leaves the wreckage behind, the scene shifts to a shallow lagoon where they wade through an intimate, water-filled canyon toward twin waterfalls. The camera then tilts upward, transitioning from horizontal movement to a vertical ascent as the character climbs the mossy cliff face toward an upper ledge. Finally, the enclosed space opens into a wide nocturnal landscape dominated by a bright moon that casts silver reflections across the water as the character walks toward distant silhouetted ruins.
